name: Law of Dispute
short_description: "The Law of Dispute" is a medieval realistic style auto chess + card type roguelike strategy game, building a deck of light strategy auto chess card battles on a 3 * 2 battlefield and achieving the final victory!
detailed_description:
【Game Introduction】


This is a medieval realistic style auto chess + card roguelike strategy game.
● Mild strategy auto chess card battles
● Asynchronous battles and friend battles anytime, anywhere
● Rich and easy-to-use deck construction
● Grand and complete world view and story background
● High-quality hand-drawn art style

【How to play】



  • Rich card content


    The current version contains 72 character cards with different skills, 40 prop cards, and more than 120 different painting cards. Of course, you can also make your cards more gorgeous and strengthen their attributes, and make good use of them to build the strongest lineup!

  • Unique tower climbing experience


    In order to make the game more interesting and random, players will choose the optimal adventure route among several different branches, whether it is a hearty battle, a mysterious random event or a bonfire in the camp to take a good rest... It all depends on your choice!

  • Games full of strategies


    Players will build and adjust their battle decks on a 3*2 battlefield before each game, and the game will be presented in the form of an automatic chess battle.
    As the game progresses, players need to constantly obtain new cards to replace and upgrade the cards already in battle, and form a more powerful lineup to achieve the final victory.

  • Rich background story


    Each card has its own unique story background behind it. The five major camps, the Kasnian Empire, the Kingdom of Kirtland, the Church of Shias, the Desert Khanate and the Chaos Tribe, are up to you to decide what kind of stories are hidden behind them. Come explore!

supported_languages:
Simplified Chinese*, English*, Japanese*, Traditional Chinese*
*languages with full audio support
